name: academic-framework-figure
description: Design, generate, and validate editable publication-quality academic method figures in draw.io.

interface.longDescription: Routes a paper method to one of three evidence-derived styles, generates a native draw.io diagram, and checks XML, embedded images, fonts, exports, and paper-scale readability.
defaultPrompt: Turn my method into an editable draw.io figure.
Rebuild this framework figure in a top-conference style.
Audit my academic figure for layout and editability.
